nasb.text: Otherwise, when he has laid a foundation and is not able to finish, all who observe it begin to ridicule him,

esv.text: Otherwise, when he has laid a foundation and is not able to finish, all who see it begin to mock him,

cnv.text: 恐怕安了地基，而不能完成，所有看見的人都譏笑他，

ccb.text: 否则，打好了地基却不能完工，徒惹别人嘲笑，

csbs.text: 免得立好了地基，却不能完工，看见的人都开始嘲笑他，
